entry.note: <L>1767<pc>8,3<k1>ac<k2>ac<h>1<e>1 <hom>1.</hom> <s>ac</s> ¦ (connected with √ <s>aYc</s>, <ab>q.v.</ab>) <ab>cl.</ab> 1. <ab>P.</ab> <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>a/cati</s>, <s>a/Ycati</s>, <s>˚te</s>, <s>AnaYca</s>, <s>˚ce</s>, to go, move, tend; <div n="to"/>to honour; <div n="to"/>to make round or curved; <div n="to"/>to request, ask, <ls>L.</ls>; <div n="to"/>to speak indistinctly, <ls>L.</ls> <div n="1"/>(also) to adorn, <ls>Dharmaś.</ls><info n="sup"/> <div n="1"/>See <hom>2.</hom> <s>acita</s>, <s>a/cizwu</s>.<info whitneyroots="ac,1"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="1P,1Ā"/> <LEND>

<L>791<pc>1-0059<k1>ac<k2>ac {#ac#}¦, {#aYc, a/cati#} <ls>NAIGH. 2,14.</ls> {#a/Ycati, ˚te; AnaYca, ˚Yce; aYcitA#} <ls>P. 8,4,58</ls>, <ls>Sch.</ls> <div n="1"> 1) {%gehen%}, <ls>DHĀTUP. 7,6.</ls> <ls n="DHĀTUP.">21,2.</ls> <ls>VOP. 8,58.</ls> {#svatantrA kaTamaYcasi#} <ls>BHAṬṬ. 4,22.</ls> {#vAmamAnaYcuryajYiyA mfgAH#} <ls n="BHAṬṬ.">14,99.</ls> {#devAnaYcati, vizvagaYcati, sahAYcati, tiro 'Ycati#} <ls>AK. 3,1,34.</ls> <ls>H. 444.</ls> {#a/cati = gatikarman#} <ls>NAIGH. 2,14.</ls> {#avyAt#} <ls>VOP. 8,58.</ls> {#akta#} <ls n="VOP.">26,102.</ls> {#aNgeti kzipranAmAYcitamevANkitaM Bavati#} <ls>NIR. 5,17.</ls> {#acita#} (<ls>DURGA</ls>: {#gata#}) <ls n="NIR.">11,25.</ls> <div n="1">— 2) {%ehren%} <ls>DHĀTUP. 7,6.</ls> {#aYcita#} und {#aYcitvA#} <ls>P. 6,4,30.</ls> <ls n="P.">7,2,53.</ls> <ls>VOP. 26,102.</ls> {#aYcyAt#} <ls n="VOP.">8,41.</ls> <ls n="VOP. 8,">58.</ls> {#aYcita#} {%geehrt%} <ls>AK. 3,2,47.</ls> <ls>H. 447.</ls> {%ausgezeichnet, ausserordentlich%}: {#aYcitAByAM gatAByAm#} ({%Gang%}) <ls>RAGH. 2,18.</ls> {#aYcitavikrama#} <ls n="RAGH.">9,24.</ls> {%geziert (?)%}: {#vaktraM svedakaRAYcitam#} (Schol. = {#vyAptam#}) <ls>AMAR. 78.</ls> <div n="1">— 3) {%biegen, krümmen%}: {#aNgulIH — acate — AYcanta#} <ls>ŚAT. BR. 3,4,3,2</ls>-<ls n="ŚAT. BR. 3,4,3,">5.</ls> <ls>KĀTY. ŚR. 7,3,7.</ls> <ls>NIR. 5,28.</ls> {#Siro 'YcitvA#} <ls>BHAṬṬ. 9,40.</ls> {#aYcita#} {%gebogen%} <ls>NIR. 5,25.</ls> {#sudIrGAYcitalANgUlAH (plavaMgamAH)#} <ls>R. 6,3,43.</ls> <ls n="R.">5,65,14.</ls> <ls>BHAṬṬ. 9,40.</ls> {#mattasiMhAYcitaskanDa#} <ls>R. 6,29,1 ... [truncated]

<L>1095<pc>1-013-b<k1>ac<k2>ac √{#ac#}¦ {#aYc, a/cati, ˚te, a/Ycati, ˚te#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%biegen%}. {#aYcita#} {%gebogen; kraus, lockig%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%gehen%}. {#saMkocamaYcati tvayi#} (<ab>d. i.</ab> {#sarasi#}) {%kommen in, theilhaft werden%} <ls>Spr. 7734</ls>. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%verfahren, zu Werke gehen%} <ls>Comm. zu TBR. 2,1,4,3</ls>. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%in ehren halten%}. {#aYcita#} {%ausgezeichnet, ausserordentlich%}. <div n="1">— 5〉 {#aYcitam#} <lex>Adv.</lex> {%behutsam, aufmerksam%}. — {#˚Ycita#} häufig fehlerhaft für {#˚cita#} ({#ci#} mit {#A#}). <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {#aYcayati#} {%erregen, bewirken%} <ls>GĪT. 10,11</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#anu#} {%nachgehen, folgen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#apa#} {%fortdrängen, vertreiben%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ava#}, <ab>Partic.</ab> {#avAYcita#} {%gesenkt%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#A#} {%biegen, krümmen%}. <ab>Absol.</ab> {#A/cya#} <ls n="Chr.">37,28</ls>. <ab>Partic.</ab> {#Akna#}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ud#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%aufheben, in die Höhe ziehen; ausschöpfen, leeren%}. <ab>Partic.</ab> {#udakta#}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%erregen, bewirken%} <ls>PRASANNAR. 136,1</ls> <ab>v. u.</ab> <div n="1">— 3〉 {%sich erheben%} <ls>BĀLAR. 203,8</ls>. {%ertönen%}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%in die Höhe ziehen; erheben%} <ls>BĀLAR. 208,4</ls>. <ab>v. u.</ab> <div n="1">— 2〉 {%ertönen lassen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#vyud#} <ab>Caus.</ab> ({#˚aYcayati#}) {%erheben%} <ls>VIDDH. 76,13</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#samud#} {%in die Höhe heben%}. <ab>Partic.</ab> {#amudakta#}. <div n="m">— <ab ... [truncated]
